title: S3 Presigning and CloudFront Signed Access in TypeScript · Mastery Check
summary: A production board compares near-miss TypeScript and AWS decisions for s3 presigning and cloudfront signed access in typescript and accepts only runtime validation, bounded ownership, causal changed-case evidence, and an explicit controlled AWS transfer gate. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for typed signed-delivery contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, presign the exact version, response metadata, method, region, credential scope, and shortest useful expiry while treating the URL as a bearer secret.
In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, choose signed URL or signed cookie by object count, path scope, player behavior, client constraints, and leakage surface.
In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, choose canned or custom CloudFront policy and constrain expiry, optional start time, resource wildcard, and IP range without accidental overbreadth.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript S3 Presigned Download · changed case · Quiz S3 Presigned Download
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz TypeScript file-delivery team handles case 6077 during a Node stream backpressure incident. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to bound SDK v3 signed access by exact time, resource, key, and bearer handling; do not treat TypeScript types, a resolved promise, CORS, ETag, or an emulator as stronger proof than it is; then replace one typed fixture with unknown runtime input and prove rejection before AWS use. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. Node and AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, PostgreSQL, credentials, host state, handle and stream checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, presign the exact version, response metadata, method, region, credential scope, and shortest useful expiry while treating the URL as a bearer secret.

Which action demonstrates S3 Presigned Download without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript S3 Presigned Download · changed case · Quiz S3 Presigned Download.
